description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a wide, rectangular wooden frame and a prominent headboard. The bed is dressed with a light gray comforter that drapes over the sides, and two pillows—one white and one beige—rest against the headboard. On one side of the bed, a built-in nightstand extends from the frame, holding a beige table lamp and a small stack of books. The wood finish of the frame and headboard is a medium brown with a subtle grain pattern, giving it a contemporary yet warm appearance. The mattress is thick and slightly recessed into the frame, providing a low-profile look. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and integrated functionality.
description: A modern platform bed with a wooden frame, headboard, light bedding, and an attached nightstand with a lamp and books.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden headboard, pillows, and the comforter draped over the bed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, two pillows, comforter, and the attached nightstand with lamp and books.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the headboard, pillows, and the nightstand with its contents.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the wooden headboard and the nightstand extending from the frame.
